mnemonics: SEASON (S: Seasonal Differencing, E: Exponential Smoothing, A: Autocorrelation, S: SARIMA Models, O: Outlier Detection, N: Nonlinear Trends)
keyPoints: Seasonal differencing removes periodic patterns to make series stationary
SARIMA models combine seasonal and non-seasonal components for forecasting
commonMistakes: Applying non-seasonal models to seasonal data without adjustment
Overlooking seasonal unit roots that require seasonal differencing
Confusing seasonal patterns with cyclical patterns of inconsistent periodicity
